summary: Arthroscopic and other minimally invasive surgical techniques provide improved access to joint spaces while minimizing tissue damage, which translates into lower complication risks—principles applicable to temporal mandibular joint interventions. Thus, a novel surgical method targeting the TMJ can reasonably be expected to offer similar benefits based on well-established advancements in joint surgery.
